examples: It TAKES special ineptitude to cheapen a principle without getting anything much in return.
Here are the second annual Meanie Awards for outstanding achievement in the field of human ineptitude.
Just as remarkable is the combination of hubris and ineptitude of those running the most troubled firms.
The world economy would still have to grapple with ineptitude elsewhere and with weak growth.
It's also pretty clear that President Banda's office has handled a messy situation with staggering ineptitude.
